asset.title: Research Upsert
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The video clearly demonstrates the upsert functionality within the GTM research sheet, showing how re-importing an existing account updates the record instead of duplicating it, supported by real-time room trace logs.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates importing and then updating the same account to show upsert behavior.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the full sequence from initial import to re-import and subsequent row update.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed interface with clear interactive elements and focus states.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom ecosystem, featuring the research tab and room trace panel.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic screen recording showing real-time UI updates and trace logs.

legibility.evidence: Text is mostly legible, though some table cells are small at standard resolution.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for GTM teams managing CRM data and account research.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly demonstrates the manual import process and actual state changes.

observedEvidence: Import accounts modal with text area input
Live table updates showing status and GTM research fields
Room trace logging events reflecting the import actions

defects.observed: The CSV input placeholder text is small and has low contrast.
defects.fix: Increase the font size or contrast of the placeholder text in the import modal.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Demonstrating the GTM research sheet's upsert capability: importing an existing account updates its fields in real-time without creating duplicates.
